mapper.insert: INSERT INTO diary (public_id, user_id, space_id, title, date, content, mood_key, content_format, visibility, locked, version, created_at) VALUES (UUID(), #{userId}, (SELECT space_id FROM diary_space WHERE personal_owner_id = #{userId}), #{title}, #{date}, #{content}, #{moodKey}, #{contentFormat}, 'PRIVATE', 0, 1, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM diary WHERE diary_id = #{diaryId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND locked = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE diary SET title = #{title}, date = #{date}, content = #{content}, mood_key = #{moodKey}, content_format = #{contentFormat}, version = version + 1 WHERE diary_id = #{diaryId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND locked = 0
mapper.delete: UPDATE diary SET deleted_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE diary_id = #{diaryId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND locked = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM diary WHERE space_id = #{spaceId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND locked = 0 AND date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND (visibility = 'SHARED' OR (#{personalSpace} = true AND user_id = #{userId})) ORDER BY date ASC, created_at ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(d.date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS count, MIN(d.diary_id) AS firstDiaryId, SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(d.title ORDER BY d.created_at ASC SEPARATOR '||'), '||', 1) AS firstTitle FROM diary d WHERE d.user_id = #{userId} AND d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.locked = 0 AND d.date >= #{startDate} AND d.date <= #{endDate} GROUP BY d.date ORDER BY d.date ASC
